---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
subtitle: "`r params$report_subtitle`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y, %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
params:
  sc_obj: NULL
  markers_data: NULL
  pathway_results: NULL
  pathway_db: NULL
  correlated_genes: NULL
  corr_target_gene: NULL
  sections: NULL
  reduction: "umap"
  traj_reduction: "umap"
  traj_genes: NULL
  saved_viz_list: NULL
  group_by: "seurat_clusters"
  report_title: "Analyse Single-Cell"
  report_subtitle: ""
  report_notes: ""
  interactive: TRUE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,
                      fig.width=9, fig.height=6, out.width="100%")
sections <- params$sections
obj      <- params$sc_obj
`%||%`   <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

# Step-3.7 fix (BUG6): printing a raw htmlwidget (plotly) inside a
# results='asis' loop mixed with cat() breaks JS/CSS dependency injection.
# Wrapping in htmltools::tagList() is the documented htmlwidgets pattern for
# this exact situation.
render_plot <- function(p, allow_interactive=TRUE) {
  if (allow_interactive && isTRUE(params$interactive) && knitr::is_html_output() &&
      requireNamespace("plotly", quietly=TRUE)) {
    return(htmltools::tagList(plotly::ggplotly(p)))
  }
  p
}

.has_corr    <- !is.null(params$correlated_genes) && !is.null(params$corr_target_gene) &&
                is.data.frame(params$correlated_genes) && nrow(params$correlated_genes) > 0
.has_markers <- !is.null(params$markers_data)    && nrow(params$markers_data)    > 0
.has_pathway <- !is.null(params$pathway_results) && nrow(params$pathway_results) > 0
.has_traj    <- !is.null(obj) && "pseudotime" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)
.has_singler <- !is.null(obj) && length(grep("^SingleR_", colnames(obj@meta.data))) > 0
.has_viz     <- !is.null(params$saved_viz_list) && length(params$saved_viz_list) > 0

# Step-3.7: genes actually present in the object, used by the new
# "Gû´nes vs Pseudotemps" section below.
.traj_genes_valid <- if (!is.null(obj)) intersect(params$traj_genes %||% character(0), rownames(obj)) else character(0)
.show_traj_genes  <- "trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj && length(.traj_genes_valid) > 0

# Safe reduction picker
.pick_red <- function(preferred) {
  reds <- names(obj@reductions)
  if (preferred %in% reds) preferred else if (length(reds) > 0) reds[1] else NULL
}

# Trajectory reduction: use stored value (PCA/UMAP/Harmony), fallback to UMAP
.traj_red <- params$traj_reduction %||% "umap"
```

```{r notes_section, eval=nzchar(params$report_notes), results='asis'}
cat("> ", gsub("\n", "\n> ", params$report_notes), "\n\n", sep="")
```

# Rûˋsumûˋ

```{r resume}
if (!is.null(obj)) {
  cat(sprintf("Cellules : %s  |  Gû´nes : %s  |  ûchantillon(s) : %d\n",
              format(ncol(obj), big.mark=","), format(nrow(obj), big.mark=","),
              length(unique(obj$orig.ident))))
} else { cat("Aucun objet Single-Cell disponible.") }
```

---

```{r qc_section, eval="qc" %in% sections && !is.null(obj), results='asis'}
cat("# QC ã ContrûÇle Qualitûˋ\n\n")
```
```{r qc_plot, eval="qc" %in% sections && !is.null(obj)}
qc_ft <- intersect(c("nFeature_RNA","nCount_RNA","percent.mt"), colnames(obj@meta.data))
if (length(qc_ft) > 0) VlnPlot(obj, features=qc_ft, ncol=length(qc_ft), pt.size=0)
```

---

```{r dim_section, eval="dim" %in% sections && !is.null(obj), results='asis'}
cat("# Rûˋduction Dimensionnelle ã", toupper(params$reduction), "\n\n")
```
```{r dim_plot, eval="dim" %in% sections && !is.null(obj)}
red <- .pick_red(params$reduction)
if (!is.null(red)) {
  render_plot(DimPlot(obj, reduction=red, group.by=params$group_by,
                      label=TRUE, pt.size=0.5) +
              ggtitle(paste(toupper(red), "ã", params$group_by)))
} else { cat("Aucune rûˋduction calculûˋe ã lancez le Pipeline.") }
```

---

```{r annot_section, eval="annotation" %in% sections && .has_singler, results='asis'}
cat("# Annotation Automatique (SingleR)\n\n")
```
```{r annot_plot, eval="annotation" %in% sections && .has_singler}
col_use <- tail(grep("^SingleR_", colnames(obj@meta.data), value=TRUE), 1)
red_a   <- .pick_red("umap")
if (!is.null(red_a)) {
  render_plot(DimPlot(obj, reduction=red_a, group.by=col_use,
                      label=TRUE, repel=TRUE, pt.size=0.5) +
              ggtitle(paste("SingleR:", col_use)))
} else { cat("UMAP non calculûˋ.") }
```

---

```{r markers_section, eval="markers" %in% sections && .has_markers, results='asis'}
cat("# Marqueurs Diffûˋrentiels\n\n")
```
```{r markers_table_html, eval="markers" %in% sections && .has_markers && knitr::is_html_output()}
build_markers_dt(params$markers_data)
```
```{r markers_table_pdf, eval="markers" %in% sections && .has_markers && !knitr::is_html_output()}
df <- params$markers_data
knitr::kable(
  head(data.frame(Gene    = df$gene,
                  Cluster = df$cluster,
                  Log2FC  = round(df$avg_log2FC, 3),
                  P_adj   = format(df$p_val_adj, scientific=TRUE, digits=3)
                  )[order(df$p_val_adj), ], 50),
  caption="Top 50 marqueurs")
```

---

```{r corr_section, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr, results='asis'}
cat("# Rûˋseau de Corrûˋlation ã", params$corr_target_gene %||% "", "\n\n")
```
```{r corr_plot, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr}
plot_gene_correlation_network(params$correlated_genes, params$corr_target_gene, top_n=20)
```

```{r corr_table_title, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n## Table des Corrûˋlations\n\n")
```
```{r corr_table_html, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr && knitr::is_html_output()}
# Step-3.7: was missing entirely from the report (network plot only).
build_corr_dt(params$correlated_genes)
```
```{r corr_table_pdf, eval="correlation" %in% sections && .has_corr && !knitr::is_html_output()}
df_c <- params$correlated_genes
knitr::kable(
  head(data.frame(Gene        = df_c$gene,
                  Correlation = round(df_c$correlation, 3),
                  P_adj       = format(df_c$p_adj, scientific=TRUE, digits=2)
                  )[order(-abs(df_c$correlation)), ], 30),
  caption="Top 30 gû´nes corrûˋlûˋs")
```

---

```{r pathway_section, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway, results='asis'}
cat("# Pathway Enrichment ã", params$pathway_db %||% "", "\n\n")
```
```{r pathway_barplot, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway}
plot_pathway_barplot(params$pathway_results, db_label=params$pathway_db %||% "", top_n=15)
```
```{r pathway_table_html, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway && knitr::is_html_output()}
build_pathway_dt(params$pathway_results)
```
```{r pathway_table_pdf, eval="pathway" %in% sections && .has_pathway && !knitr::is_html_output()}
cols <- intersect(c("ID","Description","p.adjust","Count","GeneRatio"),
                  colnames(params$pathway_results))
knitr::kable(head(params$pathway_results[, cols, drop=FALSE], 20))
```

---

```{r traj_section, eval="trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj, results='asis'}
cat("# Trajectory Analysis ã Pseudotemps\n\n")
cat(sprintf("*(Rûˋduction utilisûˋe : %s)*\n\n", toupper(.traj_red)))
```
```{r traj_plot, eval="trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj}
red_t <- .pick_red(.traj_red)
if (!is.null(red_t)) {
  render_plot(plot_trajectory(seurat_obj=obj, reduction=red_t, color_by="pseudotime"))
} else {
  cat(sprintf("Rûˋduction '%s' non trouvûˋe dans l'objet.", .traj_red))
}
```
```{r traj_dist, eval="trajectory" %in% sections && .has_traj}
tryCatch(
  print(plot_pseudotime_distribution(obj)),
  error = function(e) cat("Distribution non disponible :", conditionMessage(e))
)
```

```{r traj_genes_title, eval=.show_traj_genes, results='asis'}
cat("\n\n## Gû´nes vs Pseudotemps\n\n")
```
```{r traj_genes_plot, eval=.show_traj_genes}
# Step-3.7: was entirely missing from the report ã same helper as the live
# "Genes vs Pseudotemps" tab (single source of truth, helpers_sc.R).
tryCatch(
  render_plot(plot_genes_vs_pseudotime(obj, .traj_genes_valid, smooth_method="loess")),
  error = function(e) cat("Plot non disponible :", conditionMessage(e))
)
```

---

```{r custom_viz_check, include=FALSE}
.show_viz <- "custom_viz" %in% sections && .has_viz
```
```{r custom_viz_section, eval=.show_viz, results='asis'}
cat("# Visualisations Sauvegardûˋes\n\n")
cat(sprintf("*%d visualisation(s) exportûˋe(s) depuis l'onglet Graphiques.*\n\n",
            length(params$saved_viz_list)))
```
```{r custom_viz_loop, eval=.show_viz, results='asis'}
# build_sc_viz_plot() is defined in mod_sc_viz.R (sourced into globalenv by app.R)
# and therefore accessible here via new.env(parent=globalenv()).
for (nm in names(params$saved_viz_list)) {
  cfg <- params$saved_viz_list[[nm]]
  cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", nm))
  p <- tryCatch(
    # Step-3.7A.1: sc_gradient / sc_volcano_colors are captured at "Ajouter au
    # Rapport" time (mod_sc_viz.R .current_cfg()) alongside sc_palette/sc_manual_colors.
    build_sc_viz_plot(obj, cfg,
                      sc_palette          = cfg$sc_palette %||% "default",
                      manual_colors       = cfg$sc_manual_colors,
                      manual_gradient     = cfg$sc_gradient,
                      manual_volcano_cols = cfg$sc_volcano_colors),
    error = function(e) {
      cat(sprintf("*Erreur lors du rendu de '%s': %s*\n\n", nm, conditionMessage(e)))
      NULL
    }
  )
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    is_static_type   <- isTRUE(cfg$type %in% c("heatmap", "stacked_violin"))
    want_interactive <- !is_static_type && isTRUE(params$interactive) &&
                        knitr::is_html_output() && requireNamespace("plotly", quietly=TRUE) &&
                        (inherits(p, "gg") || inherits(p, "patchwork"))
    rendered <- FALSE
    if (want_interactive) {
      # Step-3.7A.1 fix: multiple ggplotly() widgets printed in the same
      # results='asis' loop can collide on auto-generated elementIds -- every
      # widget after the first (sometimes all of them) then fails to mount in
      # the browser: a blank space where the plot should be, with the
      # surrounding title/text rendering fine (that's plain markdown, so it
      # looked like "only the title shows up"). Forcing a unique elementId
      # per widget fixes this reliably.
      widget <- tryCatch({
        w <- plotly::ggplotly(p)
        w$elementId <- paste0("sc_viz_", make.names(nm), "_", sample.int(1e6, 1))
        w
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(widget)) { print(htmltools::tagList(widget)); rendered <- TRUE }
    }
    if (!rendered) {
      # Static fallback (heatmap/stacked_violin always, PDF always, or if the
      # interactive conversion above failed) -- image-embed is format-agnostic
      # (pandoc renders `![]()` correctly in both html_document and pdf_document).
      tmp_png <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
      ggsave(tmp_png, plot = p, width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 150, bg = "white")
      cat(sprintf("\n\n![%s](%s)\n\n", nm, tmp_png))
    }
  }
}
```

---

<small>Rapport gûˋnûˋrûˋ automatiquement par TranscriptoShiny ã module Single-Cell.</small>
